items.criterion: The PR implements KUSABI-CORE-MVP-MEMORY-PERSISTENCE-AUDIT-001 and does not substitute runtime remediation, local config mutation, release, or publish work.
All changed files remain within the Cell allowed paths, with no src, package, workflow, deploy, local config, DB content, docs/v2, schema, fixture, runner, branch protection, or ruleset edits.
The audit script is read-only: it reads config metadata and row counts only, and does not write configs, DB content, env files, or secrets.
URL-like and secret-like values are redacted before output, and stored memory text is not inspected or emitted.
Backend classification reflects post-PR #186 behavior: URL-only PostgreSQL intent is fail-closed and is not labeled as fallback-enabled.
The ops evidence labels 2026-06-22 observations as historical and does not claim current local configs are already remediated.
The PR does not edit local MCP/Claude/Codex configs, stored memory content, DB schemas, env vars, DB paths, package metadata, workflows, deployment, branch protection, or rulesets.
Diff checks, node syntax check, JSON audit run, npm test, build, typecheck, and remote CI evidence are present and match the reported scope.
The PR does not authorize backend parity, common DB completion, UAMP conformance, compliance, federation, release, publish, DLP, zero-leakage, or legal/regulatory claims.
